name: wise-claude
description: Home of the wise plugin, ported to OpenAI Codex CLI — flat /wise-* skills, a workflow engine, and shared scripts for everyday git / PR / ticket-planning tasks. Canonical install: codex plugin marketplace add e1024kb/wise-claude.

plugins.name: wise
plugins.description: Codex port of the wise copilot — flat /wise-* skills, a workflow engine with an SDLC agent roster, and shared git / PR / ticket-planning scripts.
